source: Basic Conditions of Employment Act 75 of 1997 - Section 33(1)

mandatory_fields.description: Full registered name of the employer
The period for which payment is made (e.g., 1 March 2026 to 31 March 2026)
Remuneration in money (gross pay before deductions)
Amount and purpose of each deduction made. Each deduction must be listed separately with its description (e.g., PAYE, UIF, pension, medical aid)
Actual amount paid to the employee after all deductions

conditional_fields.condition: If remuneration is calculated by reference to a rate
conditional_fields.description: The rate of pay (e.g., per hour, per week, per month)

conditional_fields.condition: If remuneration depends on hours worked
conditional_fields.description: Number of ordinary hours worked during the period
Number of overtime hours worked during the period

conditional_fields.condition: If work was performed on Sundays or public holidays
conditional_fields.description: Number of hours worked on Sundays or public holidays
Total ordinary and overtime hours worked during the averaging period

delivery_requirements.timing: On each day the employee is paid
delivery_requirements.location: At the workplace or at a place agreed to by the employee
delivery_requirements.during: Employee's ordinary working hours or within 15 minutes of shift start/end
delivery_requirements.format: Written (paper, electronic, SMS, online payroll portal are all acceptable)

zenohr_additional_fields.description: Additional fields ZenoHR includes beyond BCEA minimum for compliance transparency
